title: 50 Kroner (Famous Men and Women. Type 1)

obverse.description:
Black and violet on multicolor underprint.
At the right side a green band of flowers and a portrait of famous writer Karen Blixen, with text ”Karen Blixen”.
Upper left a green triangel with a flower and a latent ”L (for fifty).
obverse.lettering:
50
FEMTI
50
KRONER KAREN BLIXEN
DANMARKS NATIONALBANK ©

reverse.description:
Violet underprint.
At the left a centaur stone relief from Landet Church on Tåsinge. Behind which is a heart-shaped rosette in grey and green.
At the right side a green circle surrounding the watermark. In the green circle is the serial specification. Inside the circle a lot of small orange circles.
reverse.lettering:
50
FEMTI KRONER
SERIE 1997 UDSTEDT I HENHOLD TIL LOV OM DANMARKS NATIONALBANK ©
reverse.lettering_translation:
Fifty Kroner
Serie 1997 issued according to law of the Nationalbank of Denmark ©

series: Kronesedlerne 7th issue - Famous men and women
comments:
Withdrawel:
Withdrawn since: 25. August 2005.


Year:
Middle two digits of serial-number give the printing year: A5012N PrefixA5, year (20)01.
 

Signatures:
The left signature is one of the govenors for Denmarks Nationalbank.

The right signature is the Chief Cashier.

related_types.title: 50 Kroner (Famous Men and Women. Type 2; enhanced security features)

watermark.description:
Silhuetportrait of Karen Blixen.
Other security enhancements:
Black hidden security thread. 
Partly visibel metalic security thread ”window thread” with ”50 KR”
Microprint. On the Obverse is ”50 KR” printet around the watermark in microprint, and several other places is microprint used ind different sizes.
